---
title: "Liangliang Zhang, PhD"
description-meta: "Liangliang Zhang is a scholar and educator based in the United States"
image: files/profile/Liangliangzhang.JPG
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: sun
      text: CINEMA Group
      href: https://cwru-cinema.com
      target: _blank
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: CWRU Profile
      href: https://case.edu/medicine/pqhs/about/people/primary-faculty/liangliang-lyons-zhang
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:lxz716@case.edu
#    - icon: github
#      text: Github
#      href: https://github.com/drganghe
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/lyonszhang
#    - icon: mastodon
#      text: Mastodon
#      href: https://mastodon.social/@hegang    
    # - text: "{{< ai arxiv >}} arXiv" 
    #   href: http://arxiv.org/a/wang_h_19
    #   target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lyonszhang
      target: _blank
    - icon: google
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@HonglangWang     
      target: _blank 
    - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands orcid size=1xl >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5986-2260
      target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands wordpress >}} Wordpress"
    #   href: https://lyonszhang.wordpress.com/
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
    #   href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55607981900
    #   target: _blank
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=4N6ViewAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
    #   href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gang-He-19
    #   target: _blank

listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents:
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, author, description]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---


:::{#hero-heading}

Liangliang Zhang is a scholar and educator working at the intersection of biostatistics and microbiome science to advance data-driven discovery in human health!  He is an Assistant Professor in the [Department of Population and Quantitative Health Sciences](https://case.edu/medicine/pqhs/about/people/primary-faculty/liangliang-lyons-zhang){.external target="_blank"}, School of Medicine, Case Western Reserve University. 

**Education**

* PhD in Statistics (2017): Department of Statistics and Probability, Michigan State University. Advisors: Taps Maiti and Chae Young Lim.

* MS in Statistics (2015): Department of Statistics and Probability, Michigan State University.

* MS in Financial Mathematics (2012): Center for Financial Engineering, Soochow University, China. Advisors: Chenglong Xu and Guojing Wang.

* BS in Statistics (2009): Department of Statistics, Nanjing University of Posts and Telecoms, China.

See my [Curriculum Vitae](files/CV.pdf) for more information.

**Research Interests**

* Biostatistics

* Bioinformatics and Computational Biology

* Microbiome and Multi-Omics

* Bayesian Analysis

* High Dimensional Statistical Inference

* Alzheimer's Disease

* Cancer Research


:::

## Recent Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Events](posts.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">[All Posts »](/posts.qmd)</p>
